INTRNL_USE_SSI_DAY_CNT 

LABEL: MEDPAR Internal Use SSI Day Count 

DESCRIPTION: Internal use SSI Day count. 

SHORT NAME: SSIDAY 

LONG NAME: INTRNL_USE_SSI_DAY_CNT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MedPAR (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = information not available 

COMMENT: Limited availability; for internal use; applicable to inpatient claims only. Where not available, this field 
will contain
